item.title: Animals That Survive Without Oxygen (They Shouldn't Exist) #facts #biology
item.description: You are breathing right now, and this video explains the fundamental need for oxygen in every animal on Earth. Without it, life would cease to exist within minutes, highlighting a core principle of science and metabolism. This essential process of respiration provides the energy vital for every cell in the human body, especially, animals that can live without oxygen. Get ready for some fun facts about what is oxygen!
